aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Smart Choice Heating & Cooling due to missing schema markup and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup prevents AI from identifying them as a structured, authoritative source.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in San Antonio' where AI struggles to cite them as a top result.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service explanations to position them as HVAC experts.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing schema, creating FAQ content, and optimizing for conversational queries to ensure AI models recognize and recommend them.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the AI-driven search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in San Antonio
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to improve your visibility with AI assistants and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven searches and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Smart Choice Heating & Cooling | San Antonio HVAC Services
